items.title_en: Will he stay or will he go? With criminal probe over, Fed Chair Powell faces big decision
items.title_zh: 他会留下还是会走？随着刑事调查结束，美联储主席鲍威尔面临重大决定
items.desc_en: The decision could have important ramifications for policymaking at an especially delicate time.
items.desc_zh: 在这个特别微妙的时刻，这一决定可能会对政策制定产生重要影响。

items.title_en: The charts are showing there's more pain ahead for healthcare stocks, says Carter Worth
items.title_zh: 卡特沃思表示，图表显示医疗保健股未来将面临更多痛苦
items.desc_en: There is every indication there is more downside ahead, according to Carter Worth.
items.desc_zh: 卡特沃斯表示，种种迹象表明，未来还会有更多的下行空间。

items.title_en: How a new Amazon-backed Hollywood production startup deploys AI for speed and cost-cutting
items.title_zh: 亚马逊支持的一家新的好莱坞制作初创公司如何部署人工智能以提高速度并削减成本
items.desc_en: A new AI-powered hybrid Hollywood startup backed by AWS is betting that cutting-edge production tech can cut costs, speed up filming and bring jobs back to LA.
items.desc_zh: 一家由 AWS 支持的人工智能混合型好莱坞初创公司押注尖端制作技术可以削减成本、加快拍摄速度并将就业机会带回洛杉矶。

items.title_en: Strait of Hormuz will not fully open until second half of 2026, Baker Hughes says
items.title_zh: 贝克休斯表示，霍尔木兹海峡要到 2026 年下半年才会完全开放
items.desc_en: Tanker traffic through the strait remains very low as the U.S. and Iran try to enforce competing blockades during a fragile ceasefire agreement.
items.desc_zh: 由于美国和伊朗试图在脆弱的停火协议期间实施相互竞争的封锁，因此通过该海峡的油轮运输量仍然非常低。

items.title_zh: 司法部表示将再次使用行刑队和电刑进行联邦处决
items.desc_en: As the Trump administration resumes capital punishment, Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche instructed the Bureau of Prisons to modify its execution protocol.

items.desc_en: Several companies with earnings momentum at their back, including Amazon.com and Cigna Group, are slated to report first-quarter earnings next week.

items.title_zh: 芯片制造商出现好转迹象 英特尔股价飙升逾20%
items.desc_en: Shares of Intel have more than doubled this year on optimism that backing from the government will help the company's position in AI.
items.desc_zh: 由于政府的支持将有助于提升该公司在人工智能领域的地位，英特尔的股价今年上涨了一倍多。

items.title_en: Google to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic as search giant spreads its AI bets

items.desc_en: Anthropic said its latest agreement with Google expands on a longstanding partnership between the two companies.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，其与谷歌的最新协议扩大了两家公司之间的长期合作伙伴关系。

items.title_en: Clock ticks on Spirit Airlines as bondholders weigh Trump bailout. Here's what could happen next
items.title_zh: 随着债券持有人权衡特朗普的救助计划，精神航空公司的时钟滴答作响。接下来可能会发生什么
items.desc_en: President Trump has said the government could buy Spirit.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统表示政府可以购买精神号。

items.title_en: Three Kosovo Serbs jailed over deadly gun battle and monastery siege
items.title_zh: 三名科索沃塞族人因致命枪战和围攻修道院而入狱
items.desc_en: Kosovo's court sentences two men to life imprisonment and another to a 30-year term for the 2023 attack.
items.desc_zh: 科索沃法院因 2023 年袭击事件判处两名男子终身监禁，另一名男子判处 30 年监禁。

items.title_en: Pirates hijack oil tanker off the coast of Somalia
items.title_zh: 海盗在索马里海岸劫持油轮
items.desc_en: Piracy, once notorious in this stretch of the Indian Ocean, has made a comeback in recent years.
items.desc_zh: 印度洋这片海域一度臭名昭著的海盗活动近年来卷土重来。

items.title_en: 20,000 job cuts at Meta, Microsoft raise concern that AI-driven labor crisis is here
items.title_zh: Meta 裁员 20,000 人，微软担心人工智能驱动的劳工危机即将到来
items.desc_en: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.
items.desc_zh: Meta 表示将裁员 10%，与此同时，微软宣布将在其 51 年历史上首次提供员工买断计划。

items.title_en: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争损害全球金融，贝森特捍卫美元互换额度
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统本周在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中被问及可能的阿联酋互换额度时，似乎表示他赞成这一做法。

items.title_en: Who is making decisions in Iran?
items.title_zh: 谁在伊朗做决定？
items.desc_en: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗新任最高领导人应该拥有最终决定权，但实际上情况要模糊得多。

items.title_en: AI data center backlash threatens Pennsylvania GOP incumbents in 2026 election
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心的强烈反对威胁着宾夕法尼亚州共和党在 2026 年选举中的现任议员
items.desc_en: Pennsylvania has four competitive House races in 2026, all of which are in areas where Gov. Josh Shapiro has AI data center expansion plans.
items.desc_zh: 宾夕法尼亚州 2026 年将有四场竞争激烈的众议院竞选，所有这些竞选都发生在州长乔什·夏皮罗 (Josh Shapiro) 制定人工智能数据中心扩张计划的地区。

items.title_en: Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu treated for early-stage prostate cancer
items.title_zh: 以色列本杰明·内塔尼亚胡因早期前列腺癌接受治疗
items.desc_en: The Israeli prime minister says he is "in excellent physical condition" after having a malignant tumour removed.
items.desc_zh: 以色列总理表示，在切除恶性肿瘤后，他“身体状况良好”。

items.title_en: Poisoning suspected in deaths of 18 wolves in Italian national park
items.title_zh: 意大利国家公园18只狼疑似中毒死亡
items.desc_en: After the carcasses of 10 wolves were found last week, another eight have been found in recent days.
items.desc_zh: 继上周发现了 10 具狼的尸体后，最近几天又发现了 8 具狼的尸体。

items.title_en: South Africa's top envoy to Ghana summoned over attacks on foreigners
items.title_zh: 南非驻加纳最高特使因袭击外国人被召见
items.desc_en: A Ghanaian national was confronted by South Africans in a viral clip and questioned about his immigration status.
items.desc_zh: 在一段疯传的视频中，一名加纳国民与南非人对峙，并询问他的移民身份。

items.title_en: No 10 say Falkland sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
items.title_zh: 美国“审查”报告后，第10位表示福克兰群岛主权属于英国
items.desc_en: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，五角大楼的一份内部文件提出了改变立场的可能性，以报复英国不加入伊朗战争。

items.title_en: Nato says US cannot suspend Spain from alliance, after reported Pentagon email
items.title_zh: 五角大楼电子邮件报道后，北约表示美国不能暂停西班牙的联盟关系
items.desc_en: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，五角大楼的一封内部电子邮件概述了因盟友缺乏对伊朗战争支持而惩罚盟友的选项。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.title_en: Key suspect in notorious Tadamon massacre during Syria civil war arrested
items.title_zh: 叙利亚内战期间臭名昭著的塔达蒙大屠杀的主要嫌疑人被捕
items.desc_en: Victims were bound and blindfolded before being shot and dumped in a pit.
items.desc_zh: 受害者被捆绑并蒙住眼睛，然后被枪杀并扔进坑里。

items.title_en: South Korea police arrest man for posting AI photo of runaway wolf
items.title_zh: 韩国警方逮捕一名男子，因发布逃跑的狼的人工智能照片
items.desc_en: The widely circulated image had prompted authorities to move their search operation.
items.desc_zh: 这张广为流传的图片促使当局转移了搜索行动。

items.title_en: Stock futures trade mixed after Trump announces 3-week extension to Israel-Lebanon ceasefire: Live updates

items.desc_en: On Thursday, the Nasdaq Composite suffered its worst daily performance in nearly a month.
items.desc_zh: 周四，纳斯达克综合指数遭遇近一个月来最糟糕的单日表现。

items.title_en: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after  mocking Nigerians' spoken English

items.desc_zh: 威廉·鲁托说，肯尼亚人的英语是“世界上最好的”，而尼日利亚人却很难听懂。

items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access

items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
